calendar.matters:
Petition For Authority To Enter Into Contingent Fee Agreement
Off Calendar Mar-29-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Yvette Davis for Marilyn Chism and Noddie Robinson (Beneficiaries). Matthew Mraule for and with Olli Robinson Jr.

Ms. Davis informed the Court that despite not appearing on the proof of service of petition, she did recieve notice. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the issue of conflict of interest between Mr. Robinson being the administrator and his personal interest in the Civil Law suit. The Court questioned the 35% contingency fee from any property brought into the estate and the statutory fee. The Petition for Authority to Enter into Contingent Fee Agreement was taken under submission.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-06-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Yvette Davis for and with Marilyn Chism and for Noddie Robinson. Henry Glasser for Olli Robinson (Petitioner).

Ms. Davis stated that she was expecting to file Noddie's petition for appointment of Administrator today or tomorrow and that she was objecting to Ollie being appointed as her Client had priority. Mr. Glasser stated that there was an issue raised with the funds being placed in a blocked account in order to reduce the bond. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Guitron.
